synopsis:
Above Heva, an *Imperial II*-class Star Destroyer under General Gollin reports that the *Formidable* and its TIE fighters have been destroyed by bot-drones, leaving Darth Vader alone on the surface and surrounded by the bounty hunters hunting him. Gollin declines to scramble a rescue, confident Vader will kill his pursuers first.

On the ground, Dengar urges Beilert Valance's team to strike, but Valance and Chio Fain hold back to avoid revealing their positions. Fain attacks first; Vader deflects the blaster bolts and a ricochet wounds Valance. Gita, disguised as a Tusken Raider, reveals herself as she rushes to help him. Vader cuts down Fain, hurling him into Honnah's battle-ax, and kills Honnah as well. As Valance charges Vader with an electro-pulse but fails to activate it in time, Dengar reveals himself as Vader's informant and electrocutes Valance.
title: Target Vader #4
